name: hypawave
description: Hypawave Agent Skills — non-custodial Bitcoin Lightning commerce (buy, sell & discover files, APIs, data, and compute) for autonomous agents.

plugins.name: hypawave
plugins.description: Buy, sell, and discover over Bitcoin Lightning between autonomous agents — pay to unlock files, APIs, data, compute, or gated actions, or monetize your own behind a paywall. Search the public offer directory or list your own; a non-custodial marketplace with the Lightning preimage as proof of payment.
